title: 🏮Japan Textures🏮
description: This texture pack adds TTF fonts / GUI changes
body:
A Japan-styled GUI (Graphical User Interface) Minecraft texture pack completely overhauls the menu to evoke a beautiful East Asian aesthetic. 
![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d0ddd3eb0e814dd39e9e13dd8f349606631d53_0.webp)

I hope this will make your day 😁
